flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Piedmont University fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (50.3% → 42.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Piedmont University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $31.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Piedmont University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $31.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Piedmont University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
